title: Versioned Zoning Resolution ingestion (official HTML + PDF channels; content-addressable raw capture; source-fidelity harness)
objective: PROPOSED — NOT CONTRACTED (owner approval required to move backlog -> ready). Scheduled/event-driven ingestion from official ZR HTML and official PDF channels (NEVER fetched live during a property analysis). Capture per section/document: publisher + authority tier, canonical URL, retrieval timestamp, HTTP status + relevant response metadata, exact raw-content SHA-256, normalized-content SHA-256, homepage currency banner, document/section identifier + hierarchy, section title, last-amended + effective dates, tables + table structure, definitions, explicit hyperlinks/cross-references, amendment/supersession records, parser/extractor version, extraction status, raw_html_verified, human-review/G6 status. raw_html_verified true ONLY when stored raw response bytes + deterministic extraction/replay evidence exist. VERSION-CHANGE DETECTION (amendment item 8): the homepage currency banner is ONE change signal, not the sole legal-version trigger — a changed section hash, changed Last-Amended value, a new /recently-adopted amendment-feed entry, a newly adopted instrument, or a changed official PDF MUST trigger a candidate corpus version / reconciliation even when the banner is unchanged; an unchanged banner NEVER suppresses a detected content or amendment change. Store bulk raw HTML/PDF content-addressably in approved cloud object storage; NEVER commit a citywide corpus or leave bulk temp data on the owner PC. FIXTURE-vs-PRODUCTION invariant (amendment item 3): fixture/parser/harness work may be developed and reviewed while B-001 blocks durable storage, but this task does NOT reach 'accepted' — and does NOT mark the ZR corpus domain 'implemented' nor satisfy M3-T003's dependency — until durable content-addressed official captures + the required source-fidelity evidence exist (enforced by B-001 in blockers[]: acceptance is impossible while it references this task). Live-source smoke tests are SEPARATE from deterministic CI (CI uses frozen official fixtures). Full spec: project-control/reports/M3-CORPUS-REPLAN-PROPOSAL.md.
business_reason: Every rule value must trace to a versioned, hash-verified official ZR snapshot; the current M4 draft rules ride hand-captured snapshots (raw_html_verified:false) and cannot reach Verified without this ingestion + fidelity harness. Reuses the accepted resilience/transport framework rather than adding a crawler dependency.
inputs: M3-T001 accepted: SOURCE_AUTHORITY_POLICY.md (tier assignment + provenance-vs-precedence rules), LEGAL_CORPUS_COVERAGE_MATRIX.md (domain + actionable columns), legal_source_manifest schema (the record shape ingestion writes), authoritative status vocabulary

docs/SOURCE_ACCESS_REGISTRY.md section 8 — ZR portal facts: HTML tree /article-{roman}/chapter-{n}/{section}, /recently-adopted amendment feed (31 pages), /zr-downloads dated PDF snapshots, per-article/chapter PDFs; API surface verified ABSENT; homepage currency banner; per-section Last Amended; 504 on the oversized 12-10 node (low-rate, resumable)
services/api/app/resilience/transport.py (M2-T011) — bounded HTTP, Retry-After, breaker, budget: REUSE, do not fork
services/api/app/_zr_snapshots/v1/*.snapshot.json + sync_zr_snapshots (M4-T005/T006 hand-captured snapshot+hash pattern) — the interim format this ingestion supersedes/backfills
B-001 (Supabase management token) — gates durable cloud object storage AND this task's acceptance; if unavailable, bounded-fixtures-only engineering path applies
outputs: services/api/app/corpus/ingest/** — fetcher (over app.resilience.transport), normalizer, content-address hasher, manifest writer producing legal_source_manifest records (SHARED INGESTION CORE owned by this task)
services/api/app/corpus/parsers/** — stdlib HTML/PDF section+table+definition+cross-reference extraction (a non-stdlib parser requires /dependency-security FIRST; exactly one)

services/api/app/corpus/versioning/** — multi-signal version-change detector (banner + section hash + Last-Amended + amendment feed + adopted instrument + PDF), candidate-version/reconciliation emitter
services/api/app/corpus/fidelity/** — source-fidelity checks (exact-bytes hash, replay-to-source, HTML-vs-PDF compare -> data_conflict, fail-closed transport)
services/api/tests/corpus/ingest/**, services/api/tests/corpus/fidelity/**, services/api/tests/corpus/versioning/** — deterministic source-fidelity + version-detection harness on frozen fixtures
services/api/tests/fixtures/corpus/zr/** — bounded frozen official ZR HTML/PDF fixtures (NOT a citywide corpus)
infra/ingestion/zr-corpus-worker.* — Render worker/cron descriptor (only exercised when durable storage is available)
allowed_paths: services/api/app/corpus/ingest/** (SHARED ingestion core — owned by M3-T002)
services/api/app/corpus/fidelity/** (source-fidelity harness support — owned by M3-T002)
forbidden_paths: services/api/app/corpus/closure/** (owned by M3-T003), services/api/app/corpus/construction_code/** and services/api/app/corpus/overlay/** (owned by M3-T004) — M3-T002 may EXPORT its ingest/parser/fidelity core for those tasks to import read-only, but must not create or modify those trees (strictly-sequential-modification rule: only the owning task edits its tree; downstream tasks import, never mutate, the shared core)
Committing bulk/citywide raw HTML or PDF corpus into git; leaving bulk temp data on the owner PC (thin-client)
Fetching the ZR live inside any per-property analysis path; wiring ingestion into the request path
Adding requests / browser automation / scraping framework / AI framework; importing httpx in production (dev/test-only today) — new runtime deps require /dependency-security + age-gate + lock
Setting raw_html_verified true without stored raw bytes + deterministic replay evidence; marking the ZR domain 'implemented' on fixtures alone
Any rule publication/Verified labeling; editing canonical contracts; apps/web/**; project-control/** except own reports; .claude/** except own agent-memory
acceptance_preconditions: ACCEPTANCE (not gate-PASS) additionally requires: B-001 resolved; durable content-addressed official ZR captures exist in approved object storage; source-fidelity evidence (exact-bytes hash + replay-to-source + HTML-vs-PDF compare) recorded against those durable captures.

Until then, fixture/parser/harness/version-detection increments may PASS G0-G5 as an engineering increment but the task remains awaiting_gate/blocked (B-001), is NOT accepted, does NOT mark the ZR corpus domain 'implemented', and does NOT satisfy M3-T003's dependency.
acceptance_scenarios: AS-1 capture fidelity: ingesting a frozen fixture section records every required field (publisher/tier, URL, timestamp, HTTP status, raw+normalized SHA-256, banner, hierarchy/title, last-amended/effective, tables, definitions, cross-refs, amendment records, parser version, extraction status, raw_html_verified, G6 status).
AS-2 exact-bytes hash: stored raw bytes reproduce their recorded SHA-256; a single changed byte fails.
AS-3 replay to source: extracted text replays to exact source offsets/DOM nodes (HTML) or PDF page (PDF); replay mismatch fails.
AS-4 HTML-vs-PDF cross-check: official HTML and official PDF for the same section are compared; a mismatch creates a typed data_conflict (never a silent pick).

AS-5 multi-signal versioning (item 8): a changed section hash OR changed Last-Amended OR new amendment-feed entry OR newly adopted instrument OR changed official PDF triggers a candidate corpus version even when the homepage banner is UNCHANGED; and an unchanged banner never suppresses a detected content/amendment change.
AS-6 fail-closed transport: redirect / unexpected host change / malformed document / schema drift fails closed via app.resilience.transport (no partial silent ingest).
AS-7 raw_html_verified discipline: raw_html_verified is false until stored raw bytes + deterministic replay exist; an AI 'looks verbatim' assertion never flips it.
AS-8 CI isolation: deterministic CI runs entirely on frozen fixtures; live-source smoke tests are a separate suite and do not gate normal builds.

AS-9 fixture-not-production (item 3): with B-001 open, a machine/report check confirms the ZR corpus domain is NOT marked 'implemented', the task is NOT accepted, and M3-T003's dependency is NOT satisfied — only the engineering increment is reviewed.
NC-1 no live-in-request: a test asserts no per-property code path triggers a live ZR fetch.
NC-2 storage honesty: with B-001 open, the task ingests only bounded fixtures and the report states the durable-storage limitation explicitly; no bulk corpus committed or left on the PC.
NC-3 missing version evidence blocks: a section lacking version/amendment evidence is marked extraction-incomplete and is publication-ineligible.
risks: PROPOSAL ONLY: no dispatch until owner approves the packet + dependency order.

FIXTURE != PRODUCTION: gate PASS on fixtures is an engineering increment; acceptance (and satisfying M3-T003's dependency, and 'implemented' status) requires durable captures + fidelity evidence — enforced by B-001 in blockers[].
STORAGE BLOCKER B-001: durable content-addressable object storage may be unavailable; degrade to bounded-fixtures-only and say so, never fake durability.

OWNERSHIP: M3-T002 owns the shared ingest/parser/fidelity/versioning core; M3-T003 (closure/) and M3-T004 (construction_code/, overlay/) import it read-only and never mutate it (strictly-sequential-modification rule).
DEPENDENCY DISCIPLINE: reuse app.resilience.transport; stdlib parsing first; any non-stdlib HTML/PDF parser is exactly one via /dependency-security, age-gated, pinned, wheel-tested.
VERSION-SIGNAL COMPLETENESS: the banner is not the sole trigger; hash/Last-Amended/feed/instrument/PDF changes must all raise a candidate version.
harness_assignments: SOURCE-FIDELITY HARNESS (owner directive section 6): exact raw bytes reproduce hash; changed bytes fail; extracted text replays to exact source offsets/DOM nodes or PDF pages; official HTML vs official PDF compared; mismatches -> data_conflict; missing version/amendment evidence blocks publication; redirects/host changes/malformed docs/schema drift fail closed.

VERSION-CHANGE-DETECTION HARNESS (amendment item 8): banner is one signal; section-hash/Last-Amended/amendment-feed/adopted-instrument/PDF changes each raise a candidate version even with an unchanged banner; unchanged banner never suppresses a detected change.
LIVE-SOURCE SMOKE TESTS: separate from deterministic CI; detect upstream change without making normal builds depend on live government sites.
